dialogueChunks.intro: The traitor behind {quest_focus} has been unmasked. The evidence you gathered left no room for denial, and the settlement can finally begin to heal.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is shaken but relieved. The conspirator's deal with the {enemy_type} has been severed, and {quest_stakes} are secure now that {quest_threat} has been cut off at the source. {target_npc} is overseeing new security measures.
dialogueChunks.outro: It's a bitter victory, losing trust in someone you relied on. But you saved lives by finding the truth, {player_name}. That counts for everything.

playerResponses.text: Better a harsh truth than a comfortable lie.
Rebuild your trust carefully this time.

dialogueChunks.intro: The conspiracy is dismantled. {quest_focus} revealed a network of compromised positions, and every one has been addressed thanks to your work.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} lost their inside advantage and retreated from {location_hint} in disarray. {quest_ally} says rebuilding {quest_stakes} will take time, but the foundation is clean now. The settlement owes its survival to your tenacity.
dialogueChunks.outro: You took on {quest_threat} when no one else could be trusted to. {player_name}, that kind of integrity is rare.

playerResponses.text: The settlement deserved better. Now it has it.

dialogueChunks.intro: Justice was served, but the cost of {quest_focus} weighs heavily on everyone. Some truths are painful to face.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The conspirator fled toward {location} when confronted with the evidence. The {enemy_type} they'd been feeding information to turned on them when the arrangement collapsed. {quest_stakes} survived, but the betrayal left scars that won't fade quickly.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did what had to be done. {quest_threat} is ended, and {quest_ally} says the settlement will be wiser for it. Thank you, {player_name}.

playerResponses.text: Some lessons are learned the hard way.
